"All the News That's Fit to Deploy"
Thursday, 12 March 2026 Price: One Shilling Final Edition

LOCAL MAN DEPLOYS AI ACROSS 100+ MANUFACTURING PLANTS, NOBODY STOPS HIM

LONDON — In what sources describe as "an unusually productive career," Daniele D'Agnelli, Senior Engagement Manager at C3 AI, has been directing a $15M programme across all business units, managing over 70 resources, and somehow maintaining an NPS above 70.

The CEO-sponsored initiative — a predictive maintenance rollout across 100+ plants serving 2,000+ end users — has generated an estimated $18M in EBIT impact, according to internal figures obtained by this publication.

"He also deployed a GenAI RAG system across the enterprise knowledge base," said a source close to the programme, speaking on condition of anonymity because they were not authorized to be impressed.

Previously at Deloitte, D'Agnelli grew the UK Anaplan practice from zero to 25+ practitioners. Before that: Accenture, Codec, Accenture again. The man has range.

CLASSIFIEDS: daniele@dagnelli.net | github | linkedin
